name: MikroTik G1483-0600WNB Hot-Swap Power Supply
title: MikroTik G1483-0600WNB Hot-Swap Power Supply
description: The MikroTik G1483-0600WNB is a high-performance hot-swap power supply unit (PSU) designed to provide reliable and continuous power delivery for MikroTik’s advanced networking products. Specifically engineered for the CRS320-8P-8B-4S+RM PoE++ switch, this PSU delivers a robust 600 watts of power, making it capable of supporting high-demand network environments and ensuring that your MikroTik routers and switches operate efficiently without interruption. This PSU is ideal for data centers, enterprise-level networking, and telecommunications infrastructure where consistent power delivery is critical. Advanced Hot-Swap Feature. Designed for uninterrupted service, this power supply allows for hot-swapping, which means it can be replaced or upgraded without shutting down the system. This is crucial for mission-critical network operations, minimizing downtime and maintaining network integrity during power supply replacements or upgrades. Built with high-quality components, the G1483-0600WNB is designed to last and endure the rigors of continuous operation in challenging environments. This PSU includes over-voltage, under-voltage, and short circuit protection, safeguarding your networking equipment from electrical anomalies. It provides a stable 54.5V and 10.35A supply, specifically tailored to meet the demands of high-performance PoE++ applications. Specifically designed for the MikroTik CRS320-8P-8B-4S+RM, the G1483-0600WNB is perfect for businesses that require uninterrupted network service and robust power solutions. It is especially beneficial for environments where equipment must remain operational 24/7, such as servers, data centers, and critical network infrastructure. This PSU not only delivers substantial power but also provides peace of mind with its robust design and comprehensive safety features.
